Forbidden.description: The credential does not have the required scope.

NotFound.description: The requested resource does not exist or is not visible.

ProjectionRebuilding.description: The parsed projection is rebuilding; retry after the requested delay.

info.description: HTTP API for the akari React application, session ingest clients, and account automation. Browser requests authenticate with the akari_session cookie. Non-browser clients use a bearer token with the scope required by each operation.
